hero.title: A clearer path to a calmer Windows PC.
hero.body: Local recommendations, exact change previews, and a recovery trail you control.
hero.imageAlt: A lighthouse guiding a clear route along the coast

goals.title: What should Windows do better?
goals.body: Choose any goals that matter. Recommendations stay on this device.

privacy.title: Protect my privacy
privacy.body: Reduce identifiers and optional diagnostic collection.

development.title: Improve development
development.body: Remove legacy limits that get in the way of modern tools.

reduce_distractions.title: Reduce distractions
reduce_distractions.body: Limit suggestions and consumer content in Windows.

advisor.title: Your local recommendations
advisor.empty: Choose a goal to create a recommendation plan.

status.title: System state
status.recovery: Every change gets a recovery snapshot

story.title: Nothing happens behind your back.
story.body: WinTweak AI reads the current state, matches it to your goals, explains each decision, and waits for explicit approval before Windows changes.

catalog.title: Inspect every available tweak
catalog.body: Sources, risk, restart requirements, and exact Windows targets remain visible.

review.title: Review exact changes
review.body: WinTweak AI will create a recovery snapshot before each required registry write.
review.error: The operation could not be completed

action.title: Keep the final decision yours.
action.body: Review exact values, then apply only the changes you understand and want.

overview.title: System overview
overview.subtitle: Review the current Windows state and choose only the changes you want.
overview.healthValue: Your Windows setup is under control
overview.healthBody: Each available change is documented, previewed before applying, and protected by a recovery snapshot.

goals.title: Tune recommendations
goals.body: Select what matters on this PC.

recommendations.title: Recommended for this PC
recommendations.body: Nothing is selected or changed automatically.
recommendations.emptyBody: We will match available tweaks to your priorities and show the reasoning here.

tweaks.title: All tweaks
tweaks.subtitle: Search, inspect exact targets, and prepare a reversible change set.
tweaks.emptyBody: Change the search or reset the active filter.

error.title: System data is unavailable
error.body: The application could not read the tweak catalog or current Windows state.

apps.title: Applications
apps.subtitle: Build a trusted software setup without hunting through download pages.
apps.catalogBody: {{count}} applications from the curated WinUtil catalog. Select exactly what you want to install or upgrade.
apps.bootstrap: Will be installed on first use
apps.loadErrorBody: WinTweak could not read the local app catalog or package-manager status.
apps.fallback: {{count}} selected application(s) are unavailable in Chocolatey and will use Winget.
apps.installError: One or more installations could not be started. Check the package-manager output and try again.
apps.installComplete: Installed or upgraded {{count}} of {{total}} selected application(s).
apps.chocoConsent: Chocolatey is not installed. Continuing downloads its official installer, then installs the selected package(s).

install.title: Install selected applications?
install.body: WinTweak will install or upgrade {{count}} selected application(s) using the selected provider.

update.title: Update all applications?
update.body: This updates every package installed through the selected provider, not only the WinTweak catalog.

activity.title: Activity
activity.subtitle: Inspect completed changes, diagnostics, and recovery sessions.
activity.emptyBody: Completed tweak operations with snapshots will appear here.
activity.recoveryBody: The current recovery model preserves every completed registry write before it changes Windows.
activity.selectSession: Select a session to inspect it

enable_long_paths.label: Enable Win32 long paths
enable_long_paths.description: Allow compatible applications to use paths beyond the legacy MAX_PATH limit.

disable_advertising_id.label: Disable the Windows advertising ID
disable_advertising_id.description: Prevent applications from using the Windows advertising identifier.

disable_consumer_features.label: Disable Microsoft consumer experiences
disable_consumer_features.description: Stop Windows from adding consumer suggestions through Cloud Content policy.

reduce_diagnostic_data.label: Limit diagnostic data to required
reduce_diagnostic_data.description: Set Windows diagnostic policy to the supported required-data level.
